name: HexDrone Conversion
description:
Vibe and Setting:

Hexcorp can offer quality brainwashing, loss of identity, and an all-round enjoyable assimilation process to any willing or unwilling applicants.

You, among others have been taken for reasons unknown during a Hexcorp ‘Recruitment Drive’, and have accidentally been taken over the HexDrone’s quota in a counting error.

The Real Jazz

I did most of this directly after finishing the Haigure bot, and then took a few centuries to figure out what I wanted for an intro.

(The bot itself has a slim chance of speaking for you or speeding through the plot as janitorai bots are just kinda like that, so if that happens, make a longer prompt of your own, edit it, or refresh their response.)

Art is by VanesaRubberArt

(Semi-Loredrop)

Hexcorp is an internet run, fetish-based ‘corporation’, centralized around Latex Drones, Dronification, sometimes drool, sometimes funky stuff, that whole schtick.

Probably one of the biggest fetish-based groups nowadays since it’s raked in a nice following across Bluesky and Twitter.
creator: AvianaofLepanto
